vision.inspect_existing_artifacts.description: Inspect existing sam3_masks and person_metadata artifacts without schema adaptation.

vision.generate_yolo_person_masks.description: Run Computer-Graphics/scripts/generate_yolo_person_masks.py as local person segmentation fallback.

insertion.find_candidates.description: Call PersonInserter.find_insertion_patches and serialize lightweight candidate summaries.

compositing.run_light_smoke.description: Run ImageCompositor.MRFImageCompositor on a tiny synthetic patch to validate the light-consistency prototype.

compositing.compose_top_candidate.description: Run PersonInserter.compose_and_paste with ImageCompositor on a selected candidate.
